ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "stock_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price record */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol (e.g., AAPL, GOOGL) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price record */,
  "close_real" REAL /* Actual closing price of the stock on the given date */,
  "open_real" REAL /* Actual opening price of the stock on the given date */,
  "high_real" REAL /* Actual high price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_real" REAL /* Actual low price of the stock on the given date */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the stock on the given date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_price_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "forecasting_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each forecasting model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the forecasting model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of forecasting model (e.g., ARIMA, LSTM) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the forecasting model */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the model was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the model was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the model is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model parameter */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., p, d, q) */,
  "parameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "parameter_type" TEXT /* Type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float, string) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model that made the prediction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "yhat" REAL /* Predicted value */,
  "yhat_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the prediction interval */,
  "yhat_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the prediction interval */,
  "confidence_interval" REAL /* Confidence interval of the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_evaluation" (
  "evaluation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model being evaluated */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the evaluation metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the evaluation metric */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the evaluation was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evaluation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_evaluation_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "alert_name" TEXT /* Name of the alert */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition that triggers the alert (e.g., stock price > 100) */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "external_data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each external data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the external data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the external data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the external data source (e.g., news, market data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "news_articles" (
  "article_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each news article */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source the article comes from */,
  "article_title" TEXT /* Title of the news article */,
  "article_date" TEXT /* Date the news article was published */,
  "article_text" TEXT /* Text of the news article */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("article_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data record */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source the data comes from */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of market data (e.g., stock price, trading volume) */,
  "data_value" REAL /* Value of the market data */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the market data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_training_data" (
  "training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training data record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model being trained */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the training data was used */,
  "training_data" TEXT /* Training data used to train the model */,
  "training_data_type" TEXT /* Type of training data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("training_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model output record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model that generated the output */,
  "output_date" TEXT /* Date the output was generated */,
  "output_data" TEXT /* Output data from the model */,
  "output_data_type" TEXT /* Type of output data (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_explainability" (
  "explainability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each explainability record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model being explained */,
  "explainability_date" TEXT /* Date the explainability data was generated */,
  "explainability_data" TEXT /* Explainability data for the model */,
  "explainability_method" TEXT /* Method used to generate explainability data (e.g., SHAP, LIME) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("explainability_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model being ranked */,
  "ranking_date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was calculated */,
  "ranking_value" REAL /* Ranking value (e.g., 1, 2, 3) */,
  "ranking_metric" TEXT /* Metric used to calculate the ranking (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_queries" (
  "query_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each query record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the query */,
  "query_date" TEXT /* Date the query was made */,
  "query_text" TEXT /* Text of the query */,
  "query_type" TEXT /* Type of query (e.g., question, command) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("query_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_queries_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "query_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result record */,
  "query_id" INTEGER /* ID of the query the result belongs to */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date the result was generated */,
  "result_text" TEXT /* Text of the result */,
  "result_type" TEXT /* Type of result (e.g., answer, error) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_query_results_query_id FOREIGN KEY ("query_id") REFERENCES user_queries ("query_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model being evaluated */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was calculated */,
  "performance_metric" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., MAE, RMSE) */,
  "performance_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_performance_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feature record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model that uses the feature */,
  "feature_name" TEXT /* Name of the feature */,
  "feature_type" TEXT /* Type of the feature (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_features_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_hyperparameters" (
  "hyperparameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hyperparameter record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the forecasting model that uses the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the hyperparameter */,
  "hyperparameter_value" TEXT /* Value of the hyperparameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hyperparameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_hyperparameters_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES forecasting_models ("model_id")
)
